title: Nether Portal Piglin Banisher
description: A mod that... makes piglins not spawn in nether portal blocks.
body:
### BIG FAT WARNING IF YOURE A TECHNICAL MINECRAFT PLAYER GET OUTTA HERE!!
Alright, now that they're gone... my name is Enviera, or just envi for short, and this is a mod that makes piglins spawn... let's just say, every once in a while inside of nether portal blocks. Realistically, they will now have a spawn chance (inside of nether portal blocks) of 1 in 2147483647, or 1 in 32 bit integer limit. Runs on singleplayer AND dedicated servers, requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).
